name: @prune/outcome-bench
description: Benchmark v2 — outcomes, not tokens. Paired A/B harness that runs a real coding agent on oracle-graded tasks (revert-and-refix), with arm A naive and arm B TokenLens-governed, and reports task success rate alongside provider-reported token cost. Statistics from @prune/quality (Wilcoxon, NI, McNemar), accounting from @prune/telemetry + @prune/task-ledger (null-honest USD), attestation from @prune/wastebench. Dry-run mode replays canned fixture transcripts with zero model spend.
